postReview.title: Australia 1-0 Japan: Dramatic Behich winner brings World Cup qualification nearer
postReview.description: Australia are almost certain to appear at a sixth consecutive edition of the World Cup, after a last-gasp qualifying win over Japan.

QAData.question: Who won between Australia and Japan on Thu, 05 Jun 2025 11:10:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: Australia won 1–0 over Japan on Thu, 05 Jun 2025 11:10:00 GMT.
